contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Diagnose + fix Outbound Review tabs not loading + missing AI/Prospect Replied labels
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/205
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/108
  
  Details:
  Operator reported three issues:
  1. /warmup_review.html#followup not loading drafts as expected
  2. Tab badges (Warm-up, Follow-up, Prospects) not updating
  3. A specific Gmail thread should have transitioned to AI/Prospect Replied label but hadn't
  
  Diagnostic findings:
  
  For #1+#2 (DApp): commit 99d7fac refactored the page to a single API call (data.drafts_by_label + data.counts) but missed 4 stale references to the pre-refactor allDrafts variable + a typo'd renderDraftCard function. ReferenceError on render path. dapp PR #205 (merged) fixes:
  - rerenderList: source from allDraftsByLabel[activeLabel], call renderSummary for clickable chips, distinguish empty-cohort vs no-filter-match
  - renderActiveTab: thin wrapper that delegates to rerenderList (drops renderDraftCard typo + plain-text summary that ate chips)
  - onSend: looks up draft in allDraftsByLabel[activeLabel]
  JS now parses cleanly, grep confirms 0 stale refs remain.
  
  For #3 (label gap): promote_warmup_replies() in suggest_warmup_prospect_drafts.py was flipping Hit List Status to 'AI: Prospect replied' + appending DApp Remarks but never applying the AI/Prospect Replied Gmail label to the inbound message — Status said replied, Gmail label said warm-up. go_to_market PR #108 (merged) adds the label-apply step using existing smf.ensure_user_label_id helper + gsvc.users().messages().modify call. Backfill ran live for the 6 rows that were already promoted before the fix (esalen, theastrologystore, carerituals, oneelliott, seagrapeapothecary, plus this morning's) — all 6 inbound threads now correctly labeled.
  
  Outstanding: Edgar deploy still needed (./deploy.sh) for the [WARMUP SEND EVENT] Send-button flow from yesterday's pipeline.
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
